_metadata.description: Hand-curated documents and official district pages indexed into site search by title (see SEARCH.md). Two kinds: (1) documents referenced (linked) inside board agenda memos but hosted OFF the board portal — so they are not captured as board-packet attachments in document-index.json (e.g. the adopted Facilities Master Plan); (2) official district resources parents actually search for (instructional calendars, enrollment) that otherwise have no searchable record because they live on rcsdk8.net. Each entry cites its source in `provenance`. `note`/`noteEs` become the per-language record content (the search excerpt).
_metadata.source: Simbli board agendas — memo body 'Link to file' references (data/board-memos/*.json); rcsd.info homepage 'Upcoming Key Dates' links (data/district-calendar-*.json calendarUrl); rcsdk8.net official enrollment page
_metadata.method: Manually captured; bit.ly short links resolved to their canonical/CDN target with curl -IL; rcsdk8.net URLs verified live (HTTP 200) at capture time

documents.title: Final Facilities Master Plan (FMP), 2025 (PDF)
documents.itemTitle: Adoption of Final Facilities Master Plan
documents.note: Adopted 2025-06-11 as the District's official long-term facilities roadmap, guiding Measure S bond construction projects. Hosted off BoardDocs due to file size and linked from the agenda memo.

documents.title: 2025-26 School Year Calendar — TK-8 Instructional Calendar (PDF)
documents.titleEs: Calendario Escolar 2025-26 — Calendario de Instrucción TK-8 (PDF)
documents.note: Official RCSD school calendar for the 2025-26 school year: first and last day of school, holidays, breaks, parent-teacher conference weeks, and early-release days. Board approved December 11, 2024.
documents.noteEs: Calendario oficial de RCSD para el año escolar 2025-26: primer y último día de clases, días feriados, vacaciones, semanas de conferencias con padres y días de salida temprana. Aprobado por la mesa directiva el 11 de diciembre de 2024.

documents.title: 2026-27 School Year Calendar — TK-8 Instructional Calendar (PDF)
documents.titleEs: Calendario Escolar 2026-27 — Calendario de Instrucción TK-8 (PDF)
documents.note: Official RCSD school calendar for the 2026-27 school year: first and last day of school, holidays, breaks, and early-release days.
documents.noteEs: Calendario oficial de RCSD para el año escolar 2026-27: primer y último día de clases, días feriados, vacaciones y días de salida temprana.

documents.title: Enroll Your Child — Kindergarten, TK & New Student Enrollment (RCSD website)
documents.titleEs: Inscripción de Estudiantes — Kinder, TK y Estudiantes Nuevos (sitio web de RCSD)
documents.note: How to enroll your child in a Redwood City School District school: kindergarten and transitional kindergarten (TK) registration, new student enrollment, finding your neighborhood school, and school of choice applications.
documents.noteEs: Cómo inscribir a tu hijo en una escuela del Distrito Escolar de Redwood City: inscripción de kinder y kinder de transición (TK), registración de estudiantes nuevos, cómo encontrar tu escuela de vecindario y solicitudes de school of choice.

provenance.linkedFrom: rcsdk8.net main navigation ('Our Programs and Services'); year-specific page https://www.rcsdk8.net/our-programs-and-services/enrollment/2026-27-school-year-enrollment links from it
